USDY is an accumulating token where the yield accrues daily via an increasing redemption value per token.

rUSDY, on the other hand, is a distributing token where the yield accrues daily via additional tokens distributed to the holder's wallet.
Participate in voting for $rUSDY rewards distribution date and earn double $ONDO points allocation
